name: Hexblood Origins
summary: A bargain with a hag or other eerie forces transformed your character into a magical being. Roll on or choose an option from the Hexblood Origins table to determine how your character gained their lineage.
bonuses: A bargain with a hag or other eerie forces transformed your character into a magical being. Roll on or choose an option from the Hexblood Origins table to determine how your character gained their lineage.
1Seeking a child, your parent made a bargain with a hag. You are the result of that arrangement.
2Fey kidnappers swapped you and your parents’ child.
3A coven of hags lost one of its members. You were created to replace the lost hag.

traits.name: 4You were cursed as a child
traits.summary: A deal with the spirits of the forest transformed you into a hexblood, now free of the curse.
